name: list_projects
description: Retrieve a list of all projects in the workspace. Each project includes metadata like name, description, owner, and status.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of projects to return (default: 50, max: 100).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for pagination to retrieve the next set of results.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Filter by archived status (true for archived, false for active).

data.name: Mobile App Launch
data.description: Launch native iOS and Android apps
